scenarios.name: Type-safe POST server function with auth middleware and Zod validation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a raw Request handler with manual auth and validation; treatment uses createServerFn({ method: 'POST' }) with .middleware([authMiddleware]), .inputValidator(z.object(...)), and context.user threaded via next({ context }).

scenarios.name: Dynamic /posts/$postId route with server-side loader and notFound handling
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for Next.js getServerSideProps; treatment uses createFileRoute with loader calling a GET createServerFn, throws notFound() from @tanstack/react-router, defines notFoundComponent, and reads via Route.useLoaderData().
